title: Amaranth
description: 20+ unique biomes for you to explore
body:
![loaders](https://img.shields.io/badge/NEOFORGE%20%7C%20FABRIC-ffffff?style=for-the-badge&label=LOADERS&labelColor=661fc2&color=f2f7f7)   ![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/1.21.1-ffffff?style=for-the-badge&label=VERSION&labelColor=661fc2&color=f2f7f7)   ## Amaranth: *** Leaves that sway in the wind, a melon helmet, shapey terrain and mushroom tea.
Mod with scenic, unique, slightly nostalgic and very funky biomes, each one a treat to explore.
With new items, blocks, structures and trees to complement them.

### Requirements: Neo: [Terrablender](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender), [Twigonometry](https://modrinth.com/mod/twigonometry) & [KFF](https://modrinth.com/mod/kotlin-for-forge)
Fabric: [Terrablender](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender), [Twigonometry](https://modrinth.com/mod/twigonometry), [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), [FLK](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) & [Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port/versions)
